positive: A central, stylized illustration of a whimsical, forest-dwelling creature—a mix of deer, owl, and peacock, rendered with elegant, flowing lines and bold black silhouettes. The creature is perched on a tangle of stylized mossy branches and bioluminescent flora. The background should be highly detailed yet flat and non-distracting, featuring intricate mandalas of leaves and abstract forest elements. Style: Modern botanical illustration meets Art Nouveau engraving. Composition: Centered, symmetrical, ideal for repeat pattern or single apparel print. Lighting: High contrast, deep emerald and sapphire jewel tones offset by stark white and pitch black ink. Print-friendly details: Solid ink areas, minimal gradients, vector art aesthetic.
negative: blur, low resolution, artifacts, noisy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, text, watermark, signature, logos, gradients, photographic, realism, 3d render, cartoon, abstract smudge
